description_long: This chest of drawers features a broad, slightly curved wooden top with a natural wood grain pattern, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The front side displays a single wide drawer above two cabinet doors, each adorned with prominent round white knobs for easy gripping. The cabinet doors are framed with beveled edges and have a slightly recessed central panel, adding a touch of visual depth. The sides of the chest are plain, with the wood grain continuing seamlessly, and the back is flat and unadorned. The chest stands on four short, tapered legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for use in urban interiors such as entryways, garages, or community spaces.
description: A wooden chest of drawers with a curved top, a wide drawer, two cabinet doors with white knobs, and short tapered legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wood grain side panel and the overhanging curved top.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back and the full width of the curved top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar plain wood grain panel and the overhanging top.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the wide drawer, two cabinet doors with white knobs, and the beveled framing.
